message:
Simplify audit ambient context and adjust obligation grading thresholds

- ambient.rs: Remove unused ambient context fields that were adding complexity
  without benefit, consolidate context creation into single factory method
- graded.rs: Adjust obligation grade boundaries for better distribution across
  priority levels, fix edge case where grade calculation could overflow on
  very large obligation counts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -88,22 +88,13 @@ pub const KNOWN_FINDINGS: &[AmbientFinding] = &[

     AmbientFinding {
         file: "server/connection.rs",
-        line: 123,
+        line: 125,
         category: AmbientCategory::Time,
         severity: Severity::Warning,
         description: "Instant::now() in ConnectionManager::accept()",
         exempt: false,
         exemption_reason: None,
     },

-        exempt: false,
-        exemption_reason: None,
-    },
     AmbientFinding {
